title: Comparative Investigation on Flow Behavior and Energy Dissipation of a Novel Cylindrical Asteroid-Shaped Emitter and a Conventional Emitter
description: SpeakForWater Episode 2: Comparative Investigation on Flow Behavior and Energy Dissipation of a Novel Cylindrical Asteroid-Shaped Emitter and a Conventional Emitter. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
